hints.zoneTo: Tap the court at the exact point where the ball landed.
hints.zone: Tap the court where the ball landed (or skip the step).
hints.result: Log the result of the action.

postMatch.title: Post-Match
postMatch.subtitle: Select a finished match to view the report.

empty.title: No post-match data
empty.description: Complete a match in Live Scout to generate the post-match report.

postMatch.rotationStatsNote: Sideout (reception) and Break-point (serve) per rotation. Green indicates rotation above standard.
postMatch.attackHeatmapNote: Where attacks landed in the opponent's court ({{count}}).
postMatch.serveHeatmapNote: Where serves landed in the opponent's court ({{count}}).
postMatch.receptionHeatmapNote: Where the team received in our half ({{count}}).
postMatch.setterNote: Where each setter sent the ball, and how many ended in a point.
postMatch.noTaggedMoments: No tagged actions with video yet.
postMatch.noPlayerActions: No individual actions recorded in this match.

scoutingReport.title: Scouting Report
scoutingReport.subtitle: Select an opponent to view the report.
scoutingReport.noOpponents: No opponents yet. Register matches first.
scoutingReport.reportSubtitle: Report based on all actions recorded against this opponent.
scoutingReport.noPatterns: No patterns for this opponent. Add more actions and try reanalyzing.
scoutingReport.sideOutNote: Rotations where the opponent is most vulnerable.

matchDay.title: Match Day
matchDay.subtitle: Choose the next match to prepare the checklist.
matchDay.noMatch: Select a match to view the checklist.

scenario.title: Scenario
scenario.subtitle: Simulate substitutions in the starting lineup and see the projected impact.
scenario.notEnoughPlayers: You need at least 7 active players to simulate substitutions.
scenario.projectionNote: Heuristic projection based on positions + height.
scenario.verdictPositive: Substitution has a positive trend — clear gain in attack/block without losing on passing.
scenario.verdictRisk: Performance risk: projection shows a drop in kill% and side-out. Consider another option.
scenario.verdictNeutral: Marginal impact — acceptable swap for physical or tactical reasons.

inviteCode.description: Share this code with your assistant. They enter it in Join team to get immediate access.
inviteCode.noCode: This team does not have an invite code yet.
inviteCode.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate code? The previous code will stop working.
inviteCode.ownerOnly: Only the team owner can regenerate the code.

profile.title: Profile
profile.googleAccount: Your account uses Google for authentication — there is no password to change here.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.generic: Could not change password. Please try again.

quickstart.intro: In 30 seconds you will know how to log an action. The flow is the same on tablet (touch) or laptop (mouse + keyboard).
quickstart.step1: Tap a player on the court, or type the jersey number on the keyboard.
quickstart.step2: Serve, reception, set, attack, block or defense. Shortcut: 1–6.
quickstart.step3Lite: In Lite mode you only mark the target zone (optional). In Complete mode, you mark origin → destination.
quickstart.step4: Ctrl+Z or ⌫ deletes the last action (on the server too). To cancel: Esc.
quickstart.autoSave: Actions are saved automatically. You don't need to click "save".

shortcuts.contextNote: Shortcuts respect the current step: the same number selects player, action or zone depending on what you are logging.

modes.liteDesc: Short flow: player → action → zone (optional) → result. Ideal for quick scouting during the match.
modes.completeDesc: Tactical flow: player → action → origin → destination → result. Enables trajectory analysis and heatmaps.
modes.switchNote: You can switch at any time using the toggle in the top-right corner.

lineup.setLineupDesc: Click the Set lineup button. Assign the 6 players to positions P1–P6 at the start of the set.
lineup.subsDesc: Click Subs and choose who comes in and who goes out. Substitutions are applied on top of the initial lineup.
lineup.serveRotationDesc: The amber ball icon marks who is serving. You can manually correct the server or rotation.
lineup.perSetNote: In a new set, the lineup can change. The system saves separate lineups per set.

faq.q1: The action I logged doesn't appear in the log
faq.a1: The log shows the last 12 actions. If an action seems missing, check your internet connection.
faq.q2: I want to correct a wrongly logged action
faq.a2: Press ⌫ or Ctrl+Z, or click the Undo button at the top of the log. The action is also deleted on the server.
faq.q3: The video is not syncing with the actions
faq.a3: Each action is saved with the current video time. Edit the match and add a video URL.
faq.q4: A player doesn't appear on the court
faq.a4: Check that the player is marked as active in the roster. If so, set the lineup for the current set.
faq.q5: Can I use LiveScout on a tablet?
faq.a5: Yes. Touch mode is optimised for tablets. On larger screens you get keyboard shortcuts.
